replay.portable_command: cd formal/lean/zrm_accounting_aggregate_v1 && lake build --wfail && lake env leanchecker --verbose ZrmAccountingAggregateV1
replay.dependency_command: cd formal/lean/arm_zrm_frontier_v2 && lake build --wfail && lake env leanchecker --verbose ArmZrmFrontier
replay.sandbox_observation: The managed sandbox needed an ephemeral preload shim only for proc-based executable discovery; the shim is not part of the proof package or replay contract.

proved_scope: checked list and binary-tree exactness including definedness
multiset exact-coverage tree invariance for the commutative numeric fold
four-column subtraction-free conservation through folds and trees
u32 times u128 maximum is below 2^160 and 2^256
abstract empty accounting support and internal fold identity distinctions
nonclaims: Lean CoversExactly is a multiset-permutation relation, not RFC-0004 ordered coverage-manifest concatenation.
The package does not prove sparse finite-map bytes, accepted-journal opening/root authentication, Rust U256, circuit carries, or external transition authority.
The theorem package is research evidence and does not approve RFC-0004.
